data.body: Implemented. src/rebar/_io/{__init__,export_ndjson,_strip,_cli}.py; rebar export CLI (-o, --status/--type/--parent, --strip-external/--no-jira, --include-session-logs/--exclude-archived/--include-deleted) + rebar.export_tickets(); schemas/export.schema.json (allOf ticket_state + schema_version) wired into OUTPUT_SCHEMAS + registry; overview/help/_IO dispatch group updated (drift guards updated to match). Streaming via reduce_ticket (guard test sabotages reduce_all_tickets). Tests: tests/unit/io/test_strip_external.py (3) + tests/interfaces/io/test_export_ndjson.py (7); contracts 77 pass, mcp coverage 24 pass. ruff clean.
